Courses in 2025-2026 Academic Catalog - DRAFT COPY 117

COMM385 Influence (3 Credits)

Explores contemporary theories of influence and their implications

for communication practice. Topics include power and influence, logical theory, rhetorical theory, persuasion theory, framing theory, social influence theory, and propagation of influence in mediated social networks.

Credit Only Granted for. COMM385 or COMM498I (Spring 2014). Formerly: COMM498I (Spring 2014).
